summary: Terra Classic (LUNC) is the original Terra chain that was re-branded/forked after the May 2022 collapse of UST. The original LUNA (now LUNC) was a fair-launch-style proof-of-stake token with no traditional VC/team vesting cliffs in the conventional sense — supply was algorithmically minted and burned to maintain the UST peg, and the chain suffered a hyperinflationary death spiral that expanded supply to ~6.9 trillion tokens. Post-collapse, the community passed governance proposals (notably Proposal 3568 and the 1.2% burn tax proposals) to reduce supply via on-chain burns; there are no discrete future cliff unlocks scheduled because the token was never distributed under a time-locked vesting contract structure. Ongoing 'unlock pressure' is effectively replaced by staking emission pressure (new LUNC minted as staking rewards at a governance-set rate) and the counteracting community burn mechanism.
caveats: 1) tokenunlocks.app does not list LUNC as a tracked project with scheduled unlock events (verified via public search at https://tokenunlocks.app — no LUNC page exists). 2) CryptoRank.io free tier shows no vesting schedule for LUNC (https://cryptorank.io/price/terra-luna-classic — vesting tab is empty or absent). 3) Messari free profile (https://messari.io/asset/terra-classic) does not list structured vesting tranches for LUNC. 4) The original Terra whitepaper and launch docs (https://docs.terra.money) describe an algorithmic seigniorage model, not a VC-round vesting schedule. 5) Post-collapse governance docs on the Terra Classic Commonwealth forum (https://classic-agora.terra.money) and Station governance portal confirm no cliff unlocks — supply changes are driven by staking emissions and burn proposals only. 6) Any early-era team/investor allocations from 2018–2019 (Terraform Labs raised ~$32M in private rounds) would have fully vested years ago and are NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER in terms of precise historical vesting dates, as Terraform Labs never published a public vesting schedule and the company is now defunct/in legal proceedings. No fabricated dates are provided.
